case_title: NICOLE HAWKINS VS. LINDA GRISBY et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAWKINS, NICOLE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE WAIVED) SERVED NOV-16-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FOGGY, LAMONT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE WAIVED) SERVED NOV-16-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GRISBY, LINDA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-26-2007 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM GEOFFREY HOWARD, CLERK: S. VANTREE, NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAWKINS, NICOLE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GRISBY, LINDA FOGGY, LAMONT PLAINTIFF DID NOT ESTABLISH A DEFAMATORY STATEMENT OR OTHER DAMAGE BY THE DEFENDANTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HAWKINS, NICOLE AS TO DEFENDANT GRISBY, LINDA FOGGY, LAMONT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-26-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-26-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-26-2007 BY JUDGE PRO TEM GEOFFREY HOWARD, CLERK: S.VANTREE, BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. (506).
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO LAMONT FOGGY.
